category_sources: Official pandoc.org manual identifies Pandoc as a universal document converter.
source_facts.description calls Pandoc a Swiss-army knife of markup format conversion.
display_name_sources: Official pandoc.org site and manual use the name Pandoc.
docs_sources: Official pandoc.org User's Guide is the primary Pandoc manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/jgm/pandoc; per instructions, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Pandoc manual documents conversion among Markdown, HTML, LaTeX, EPUB, DOCX, and many other formats.
